title: Croatian Chicken Wrap
description: A simple and delicious wrap filled with chicken, Croatian spices, and chocolatey goodness. This dish is perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.

ingredients.name: Croatian spices
ingredients.notes: use a mix of paprika, garlic, and caraway seeds

ingredients.name: chocolatey spread
ingredients.notes: use a dairy-free chocolate spread for a vegan version

instructions: 1. Preheat your grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
2. In a large bowl, whisk together the milk and Croatian spices. Add the chicken breast and marinate for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours in the refrigerator.
3. Remove the chicken from the marinade and cook on the grill for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
4. Meanwhile, toast the wrap by wrapping it in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
5. Slice the cooked chicken into thin strips.
6. Spread the chocolatey spread on the toasted wrap.
7. Add the sliced chicken on top of the chocolatey spread.
8. Fold the wrap in half to enclose the filling.
